title: Animated loading screen
description: Replaced old Minecraft loading screen with Minecraft Dungeons animation
body:
Have you been bored of the static minecraft loading screen? With this mod, you can replace the screen with a cool animation!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Whx-5CFslfs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The animated speeds up according your Minecraft's loading speed! You won't need to wait longer than you originally did for Minecraft to load.

## Modpack usage
Do it!

## Need help? Or want something to be changed?
Open a issue or contact me on Discord. My Discord tag is `@cyao.`, I am on the Fabric Discord server, but feel free to send a friend request.
